+1 LGTM

Will commit the patch.
Sigh, sorry for raising one more issue after saying +1, but I think we should also update TimelineServer.md to describe applicationTags and update the example.
Please summarize what "handling tags" for completed jobs means here?

RM publishes the tags information to the timeline server; the timeline server renders this information on app page, and  makes it available via REST API /apps/\{appId\}.

The problem is after synchronizing RM and GHS web UI, GHS web UI will have an empty application tags row, because this information is not passed from RM to timeline server.

bq. I think we should also update TimelineServer.md to describe applicationTags and update the example.
Added

[~sseth] can you please comment on the above (use of Private API)?

ApplicationReport.newInstance is used by mapreduce and Tez, and potentially other applications which may be modeled along the same AMs. It'll be useful to make the API change here compatible. This is along the lines of newInstances being used for various constructs like ContainerId, AppId, etc.
With the change, I don't believe MR2.6 will work with a 2.8 cluster - depending on how the classpath is setup.

Per discussion offline with Sid, my proposal is:

1.Revert the current commit, create and commit a new patch with compatible newInstance change.

2. Do not change the annotation from Private to Public as it's separate issue. File another jira or link to the existing jira to track the problem of downstream projects' reference to private methods in api/common module.

I am ok with this plan.

Sigh, sorry for raising one more issue after saying +1, but I think we should also update TimelineServer.md to describe applicationTags and update the example.
Please summarize what "handling tags" for completed jobs means here?

RM publishes the tags information to the timeline server; the timeline server renders this information on app page, and  makes it available via REST API /apps/\{appId\}.

The problem is after synchronizing RM and GHS web UI, GHS web UI will have an empty application tags row, because this information is not passed from RM to timeline server.

bq. I think we should also update TimelineServer.md to describe applicationTags and update the example.

[~sseth] can you please comment on the above (use of Private API)?

ApplicationReport.newInstance is used by mapreduce and Tez, and potentially other applications which may be modeled along the same AMs. It'll be useful to make the API change here compatible. This is along the lines of newInstances being used for various constructs like ContainerId, AppId, etc.
With the change, I don't believe MR2.6 will work with a 2.8 cluster - depending on how the classpath is setup.

Per discussion offline with Sid, my proposal is:

1.Revert the current commit, create and commit a new patch with compatible newInstance change.

2. Do not change the annotation from Private to Public as it's separate issue. File another jira or link to the existing jira to track the problem of downstream projects' reference to private methods in api/common module.

I am ok with this plan.
